ichigo_bankai.name: Ichigo Kurosaki (Bankai)

weapon_stamps.pull_recommendation: YES: HIGH VALUE - Crit rate to crit dmg conversion

boundary_changes.b1: 60% crit rate boost (30% stacking 2x), converts excess crit at 1:2 ratio
boundary_changes.build_impact: Build does not change - conversion handles excess

dupes.notes: A1 and A6 are highest value

ichigo_bankai.notes: Highest DPS in game, Hollowfication mode provides invulnerability and skill resets

kenpachi_zaraki.name: Kenpachi Zaraki

boundary_changes.b1: No longer needs ultimate charge rate
boundary_changes.b2: 30% crit rate boost (requires 60% ailment bonus), core stamp gives 20%, use Crit DMG slot 2

dupes.notes: B1 is good, B2+B4+B6 are really great

kenpachi_zaraki.notes: Massive burst damage, B2 changes build to favor Crit DMG

gin_ichimaru.name: Gin Ichimaru

boundary_changes.notes: Build does not change with dupes

dupes.notes: Full investment character, all dupes are amazing

gin_ichimaru.notes: Insane value with boundary dupes, Wound stacking, grouping

toshiro_hitsugaya.name: Toshiro Hitsugaya

weapon_stamps.pull_recommendation: YES: HIGH VALUE if you have core stamp

boundary_changes.b2: Gains 40% Crit Rate (20% stacking 2x). Paired with weapon stamp 30%, slot 2 now favors CRIT DMG over CRIT RATE

toshiro_hitsugaya.notes: Freeze comp core, Bankai state, Hyoten Hyakkaso

kisuke_urahara.name: Kisuke Urahara

weapon_stamps.pull_recommendation: YES: HIGH VALUE - More Reishi stacks

boundary_changes.notes: Build does not change with dupes

dupes.notes: B0, B2, B4 are amazing, B6 is great

kisuke_urahara.notes: Premier support, universal buffer, global ATK + Crit DMG buffs, fits every team

sosuke_aizen.name: Sosuke Aizen

weapon_stamps.pull_recommendation: YES: HIGH CRIT RATE from weapon

boundary_changes.b6: Doubles the crit rate of battlefield skills. Crit DMG slot 2 preferred with only a few crit rate substats

dupes.notes: B4 and B6 are amazing, B1 and B2 are great

sosuke_aizen.notes: Crowd control, debuffs, doubles crit rate at B6

nelliel_tu_odelschwanck.name: Nelliel Tu Odelschwanck

boundary_changes.notes: Build does not change with dupes

dupes.notes: B1 and B2 are great, B6 is insane

nelliel_tu_odelschwanck.notes: Newer unit, high value, invincibility from weapon

kaname_tosen.name: Kaname Tosen

weapon_stamps.pull_recommendation: YES: HIGH VALUE - Great DPS follow up

boundary_changes.notes: Build does not change with dupes

dupes.notes: All dupes are amazing, full investment worth it

kaname_tosen.notes: Wound stacking, grouping, cooldown resets, Thrust team core
